headline: I help businesses on building top-tier IT teams from LATAM in less than 3 days | Nearshore Software Services Expert | Tech Leadership | Strategic Partner | IT Staff Augmentation | CEO
about:
A few years ago, I was on a call with a U.S. tech executive who had just secured funding and had a clear roadmap ahead.
They had the vision, the team, and early traction but they were falling behind.

“We can’t move fast enough,” they said.
“Hiring locally takes too long. We’re losing momentum.”

That conversation wasn’t unique. I kept hearing the same frustration from CTOs, heads of engineering, and product leaders across startups, scaleups, and enterprise teams.

They weren’t lacking ideas or ambition. What they needed was the ability to execute with clarity, speed, and confidence.

That’s why I founded Nearcode.

Not to be another outsourcing vendor, but to become a trusted partner that connects U.S. companies with high-performing engineering talent across LATAM. Our teams embed quickly, adapt to your culture, and focus on outcomes not just deliverables.

We’ve helped multiple companies to accelerate product delivery, supported healthtech organizations under strict compliance constraints, and enabled digital transformation in SaaS, logistics, and consumer platforms.

But what sets us apart isn’t just speed or technical execution.
It’s how we listen. How we simplify. How we bring structure and alignment when things feel messy or stalled.

As a former engineer at Microsoft and Gorilla Logic, and now CEO, I operate at the intersection of software, strategy, and people. I speak tech, but I also speak business. That’s what allows me to guide teams and leaders through complex decisions with clarity and trust.

At Nearcode, we don’t just build software.
We build momentum.
We build partnerships that scale.
We build the foundation for teams to grow without friction.

If you're leading a company that’s ready to scale faster and smarter, I’d love to connect.

 Reach out at alexander.salas@nearcodecr.com or send me a DM.

* Built and scaled cross-functional engineering squads for over 30 U.S. companies across fintech, healthtech, SaaS, and logistics, reducing time-to-market by up to 40%.
